src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Disable Spring Security auto-configuration to allow the application to start without a security context, likely due to changes in Spring Boot 2.7+ default security behavior.
Replace the deprecated @ZeebeDeployment annotation with the new @Deployment annotation required by the upgraded Zeebe Spring client library.
Configure Swagger/OpenAPI to document the Bearer JWT security scheme for API documentation purposes.
Replace custom configuration bean injection with direct Spring @Value property injection for WebSocket allowed origins.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: Replaced @Autowired ProcessSolutionConfiguration with @Value("${websocket.allowedOrigin:*}") and updated usage in registerStompEndpoints.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Inject a configuration property to determine if Keycloak authentication is enabled.
Inject HttpServletRequest via dependency injection instead of retrieving it from the request context.
Inject KeycloakService to handle Keycloak-specific authentication logic.
Simplify getServerHost by using the injected request field directly.
Replace the helper method that fetched the request from context with a simple getter for the injected field.
Remove the unused allowFrames method.
Add a helper method to check if Keycloak authentication is active.
Add a unified method to get the authenticated username, supporting both Keycloak and JWT authentication strategies.
src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.human_impl: protected String getAuthenticatedUsername() { if (isKeycloakAuth()) { return keycloakService.getUsername(request); } ... }

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Controller now extends AbstractController to inherit common request handling utilities.
Changed the base request mapping path from /authentication to /api/auth.
Added constructor injection for OrganizationService and KeycloakService.
Replaced stub login implementation with actual credential verification via OrganizationService.
Added a new GET /user endpoint to retrieve the currently authenticated user details.
Added a new GET /logout endpoint to invalidate sessions or logout from Keycloak.
Implemented JWT token generation and assignment to the AuthUser object upon login.
Added conditional logic to support Keycloak authentication alongside local authentication.
Replace list-based file storage with a map-based structure using a custom DTO to support reference-based retrieval.
Introduce a FileHolder DTO to encapsulate file metadata and path information.
Change the base request mapping to include an API prefix for better routing structure.
Enable Cross-Origin Resource Sharing for the controller to allow frontend access.
Switch from legacy java.io.File list operations to java.nio.file.Path and Files utilities.
Implement a new GET endpoint to serve uploaded files by reference using Spring Resource abstraction.
Change the upload endpoint to return the structured FileHolder object instead of a generic Map.
Update import to use a new package path for the Form DTO class.
Add import for OperateException to handle exceptions from the Operate client.
Add import for IsAuthenticated annotation to secure endpoints.
Add import for BpmnService to retrieve embedded form schemas.
Add import for InternationalizationService to support form translation.
Remove unused import for the old Form DTO package.
Remove unused import for TaskListService as it is replaced by BpmnService.
Add CrossOrigin annotation at class level to allow cross-origin requests.
Change the base request mapping path for the controller.
Remove specific origins configuration from CrossOrigin as it is now handled at class level or default.
Inject BpmnService to access BPMN process definitions and embedded forms.
Inject InternationalizationService to translate form schemas.
Remove TaskListService field as it is no longer used for form retrieval.
Add IsAuthenticated annotation to secure the getFormSchema endpoint.
Update exception list to include NumberFormatException and OperateException.
Add overloaded getFormSchema method to support processName parameter.
Add overloaded getFormSchema method to support locale parameter for internationalization.
Replace TaskListService call with BpmnService to retrieve embedded form schema.
Apply internationalization translation to the form schema if a locale is provided.
Change form lookup method from findFormJsonFileByFormKey to findByName.
Add IsAuthenticated annotation to secure the getInstanciationFormSchema endpoint.
Change form lookup method in getInstanciationFormSchema from findFormJsonFileByFormKey to findByName.
Add custom @IsEditor annotation to enforce role-based access control on form endpoints.
Prefix the controller mapping with /api to align with standard API routing conventions.
Simplify CORS configuration by using the default @CrossOrigin annotation instead of explicit origins.
Refactor the getForm endpoint to use findByName instead of findFormJsonFileByFormKey.
Refactor the deleteForm endpoint to use deleteByName instead of the previous method.
Update the Form DTO import to point to the new jsonmodel package location.
Update import path for MailTemplate to reflect a package restructuring from dto to jsonmodel.
Add custom security annotation to enforce editor role access on endpoints.
Simplify CrossOrigin annotation by removing explicit origins attribute, relying on default behavior.
Prefix the controller's request mapping with /api to align with standard API routing conventions.
Protect the save endpoint with the IsEditor security annotation.
Protect the getMailTemplate endpoint with the IsEditor security annotation.
Protect the deleteForm endpoint with the IsEditor security annotation.
Protect the mailNames endpoint with the IsEditor security annotation.
Rename the method formNames to mailNames to accurately reflect that it returns mail template names.
Replace wildcard import with explicit imports for Spring annotations to improve code clarity and maintainability.
Update the base request mapping path to include an 'api' prefix for better URL structure.
Add custom @IsAuthenticated annotation to the startProcessInstance endpoint to enforce authentication.
Add custom @IsAuthenticated annotation to the publishMessage endpoint to enforce authentication.
Add custom @IsAuthenticated annotation to the latestDefinitions endpoint to enforce authentication.
Replace UserService with OrganizationService to align with updated domain model structure.
Update method call to use the new service's API for retrieving users.
Update import statement to reflect the new package location of the User model class.
Change the base request mapping path to follow new API conventions.
Simplify CrossOrigin annotation by removing explicit origins attribute.
Change variable type from List to Collection to match the new service return type.
TaskController now extends AbstractController to inherit common functionality.
Replaced wildcard Spring imports with explicit imports for clarity.
Removed unused import for TaskState.
Added @IsAuthenticated annotation to enforce authentication on endpoints.
Changed the base request mapping path for the controller.
Removed the dedicated endpoint for retrieving unassigned tasks.
Removed the dedicated endpoint for retrieving completed tasks by user ID.
Removed the dedicated endpoint for retrieving opened tasks by user ID.
Removed the dedicated endpoint for retrieving tasks by group.
Added a new search endpoint to replace multiple specific task retrieval endpoints.
Removed userId from the claim task endpoint path, relying on authentication context instead.
Updated claim task logic to retrieve username from the authenticated session rather than path variable.
Renamed the unclaim task method to accurately reflect its action.
Implemented getLogger method required by the new AbstractController base class.
Remove the 'id' field and its associated getter/setter methods from the AuthUser DTO.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Add a 'groups' field of type Set<String> with getter and setter to the AuthUser DTO.

src/main/java/org/example/camunda/proces.general_idea: Add import for java.util.Set to support the new groups field.
